summary: Implemented all 13 code quality improvements from the PR 1 Foundations Logic review across 6 phases: formatting/documentation cleanup, ListHelpers relocation to Foundations/Data/, redundant import trimming, coordinated rename of theorem_flip/app1/app2 and G/H_imp_trans', LeftMono/RightMono variable alignment and S5 variable standardization, and S5.lean abbreviation refactoring using diamond'/iff'/conj'/disj'. All changes verified with lake build after each phase.
